200.description: Price calculation result with total, fees, discounts, and availability status

schema.description: Price calculation result. The response code indicates availability: 0 = available, 1 = booking conflict, 2 = dates unavailable, 3 = too many guests, 4 = date in past

response.description: Response code: 0 = available, 1 = booking conflict, 2 = dates unavailable, 3 = too many guests, 4 = date in past

price.description: Accommodation charge in GBP (before cleaning fee and service fee)

final_total_price.description: Final total price in GBP including all fees and discounts

normal_price.description: Original price before any discounts were applied (only present when a discount exists)

apply_price.description: Pricing model used for this property

service_apply.description: Whether a service fee is applied to this property

is_special_price.description: Whether a special / promotional price has been applied

discount.description: Discount details when a SuperControl discount is applied

applicable_discount.description: Name of the applicable discount (if any)

error.description: Error message when required parameters are missing
error.example: start_date, property_id, and num_nights are required

schema.title: Price

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying
